name: Civic Harmony Hall Archetype
summary: Canonical structural model for harmony halls placed across the Principalities.
day_to_day: Standardizes intake, mediation, detention, and shrine integration.
who_works_there: Architects, clerks, arbiters, guards, and custodial staff.
who_uses_it: House officials, local residents, merchants, bounty actors.
authority: Template authority only; governs what a harmony hall should include and support.
public_manifestation: Recognizable façade, counters, shrine of balance, and secure rear detention spaces.
conflict_or_bottleneck: A strong template can still be politically colored by the host principality.
